prompt_identifiers.concept: An ancient temple lost within a bioluminescent jungle

metadata.original_prompt: An ancient temple lost within a bioluminescent jungle, its stone walls covered in glowing runes that pulse with forgotten power. Massive tree roots have intertwined with the architecture, forming natural archways and bridges. Floating lanterns, imbued with spiritual energy, illuminate the pathways, while ethereal wisps of blue fire hover above the ground. A lone explorer, clad in enchanted armor, stands before a monolithic door, their torchlight flickering against the stone-carved murals depicting gods long lost to time. - Style: Cinematic fantasy, intricate details, mystical atmosphere
metadata.source_file: AI Art Prompts 500+ MidJourney, DALL-E Stable Diffusion Prompts for Beginners (2025) Ultimate Prompt Engineering Guide for… (Hayes, Cipher) (z-library.sk, 1lib.sk, z-lib.sk).txt

prompt_identifiers.concept: A warrior with a celestial blade forged from

metadata.original_prompt: A warrior with a celestial blade forged from condensed stardust, standing against a towering colossus with molten lava coursing through its stone veins. The battlefield is a shattered landscape of obsidian and fire, with rivers of molten gold flowing beneath. Thunderous clouds swirl overhead, crackling with arcane lightning, as the warrior’s armor gleams with sacred inscriptions. Sparks fly as the blade makes contact with the titan’s armored hide, sending shockwaves through the air. - Style: Dark fantasy, oil painting, high-contrast lighting

prompt_identifiers.concept: A neon lit metropolis at midnight its streets

metadata.original_prompt: A neon-lit metropolis at midnight, its streets alive with glowing holograms, towering skyscrapers, and bustling crowds of cybernetically enhanced citizens. Rain pours onto the reflective pavement, creating a kaleidoscope of neon blues, pinks, and purples. A lone figure in a sleek black trench coat walks through the city, their augmented eyes scanning digital advertisements flickering in the air. Hover cars zoom past, leaving behind electric trails, while distant thunder rumbles across the skyline. - Style: Cyberpunk noir, ultra-HD, cinematic lighting
metadata.source_file: AI Art Prompts 500+ MidJourney, DALL-E Stable Diffusion Prompts for Beginners (2025) Ultimate Prompt Engineering Guide for… (Hayes, Cipher) (z-library.sk, 1lib.sk, z-lib.sk).txt

prompt_identifiers.concept: A futuristic Tokyo at dawn its skyline dominated

metadata.original_prompt: A futuristic Tokyo at dawn, its skyline dominated by colossal digital billboards displaying hyper-realistic advertisements for AI companions and cybernetic enhancements. Elevated highways weave through the skyscrapers, while monorails glide soundlessly above the streets. A masked mercenary perches on a rooftop, their cybernetic arm gripping a sniper rifle infused with nanotech. The air is thick with fog, partially obscuring the robotic sentinels patrolling below. - Style: Futuristic cyberpunk, hyperrealistic, cinematic depth

prompt_identifiers.concept: A high speed hover bike chase through a

metadata.original_prompt: A high-speed hover bike chase through a cybernetic highway, neon streaks of blue and pink illuminating the scene as two riders clad in sleek, armored suits dodge laser fire. Their bikes leave electric trails as they maneuver through dense traffic, past towering holographic billboards advertising AI dreamscapes. The city below is a glowing labyrinth of interconnected circuits and sprawling digital networks. - Style: High-action cyberpunk, dynamic lighting, ultra-detailed

The ground is composed of liquid mirrors, reflecting endless versions of reality. The forge is powered by dragon fire, and spectral ancestors whisper ancient enchantments into the blade. Sparks fly in the dimly lit chamber, illuminating walls lined with legendary weapons and arcane symbols. - Style: Fantasy realism, dynamic lighting, cinematic composition

prompt_identifiers.concept: A floating city built atop enormous slow moving

metadata.original_prompt: A floating city built atop enormous, slow-moving airships, each vessel designed as a different architectural wonder-one resembling an ancient temple, another a crystalline palace. Sky bridges made of light connect the ships, while glowing birds weave between the towers, leaving trails of stardust in their wake. Below, an endless sea of clouds swirls, revealing glimpses of a hidden world beneath. - Style: Steampunk fantasy, cinematic, 8K ultra-detailed

metadata.original_prompt: A cybernetic assassin standing on the rooftop of a towering megacity, rain pouring down as glowing billboards flicker around them. Their sleek, black bodysuit is lined with crimson circuitry, and their mechanical eye scans the streets below, locking onto a high-value target. The city's skyline stretches endlessly, disappearing into a haze of electric smog. - Style: Cyberpunk action, cinematic, hyperrealistic textures
metadata.source_file: AI Art Prompts 500+ MidJourney, DALL-E Stable Diffusion Prompts for Beginners (2025) Ultimate Prompt Engineering Guide for… (Hayes, Cipher) (z-library.sk, 1lib.sk, z-lib.sk).txt

prompt_identifiers.concept: A colossal spaceship drifting through an asteroid field

metadata.original_prompt: A colossal spaceship drifting through an asteroid field, its hull covered in intricate golden patterns resembling an ancient civilization's scripture. Inside, a crew of humanoid androids navigate a glowing control panel that resembles a celestial map of the universe. - Style: Sci-fi epic, ultra-detailed, cinematic

prompt_identifiers.concept: A colony on a distant exoplanet where bioluminescent

metadata.original_prompt: A colony on a distant exoplanet, where bioluminescent plants thrive under a sky with three suns. Towering crystalline formations rise from the landscape, pulsating with energy. Scientists in advanced exosuits study the native life forms-creatures with translucent wings and iridescent skin. - Style: Space exploration, hyperrealistic textures, vibrant colors

prompt_identifiers.concept: A grand spaceship port where travelers from multiple

metadata.original_prompt: A grand spaceship port where travelers from multiple galaxies gather, their outfits reflecting the cultures of countless alien worlds. Spaceships of various designs hover in designated landing zones, while an enormous transparent dome showcases the swirling cosmos beyond. - Style: Sci-fi concept art, photorealistic, hyper-detailed

prompt_identifiers.concept: A scientist inside a zero gravity research station

metadata.original_prompt: A scientist inside a zero-gravity research station orbiting Saturn, their holographic notes floating mid-air as they observe a microscopic black hole contained within a magnetic field. The station’s large observation window reveals Saturn’s rings in breathtaking clarity. - Style: Scientific realism, futuristic aesthetic, cinematic
